query: SELECT u.id as user_id, u.name, u.role, u.teamRole as user_teamRole, tm.id as tm_id, tm.name as tm_name, tm.teamRole as tm_teamRole, tm.userId as tm_userId FROM users u LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.userId = u.id ORDER BY u.id LIMIT 20;
